_comment: View-layer agent display names + factual blurbs. Phase H (2026-04-27) — flavor lines stripped per operator feedback that 'Synthos is sweeping the wire' was useless obfuscation. The lexicon now exists purely to map raw agent identifiers (retail_news_agent.py) to friendly display names (News Agent) plus a one-line factual description of what the agent does. The portal renders the running agent's display_name + blurb + age plainly, no random rotation.

retail_trade_logic_agent.py.blurb: Evaluates validated signals through 13 gates and routes BUY / SKIP / EXIT decisions to Alpaca.

retail_news_agent.py.blurb: Pulls Alpaca news + politician disclosures through 22 gates of classification, validation, and ticker attribution.

retail_market_sentiment_agent.py.blurb: 27-gate cascade detector — monitors put/call, insider flow, volume, and macro regime.

retail_sector_screener.py.blurb: Scores 11 sector ETF top-10 holdings on news + sentiment + 3-month momentum.

retail_macro_regime_agent.py.blurb: Classifies the macro environment as BEAR / BULL / NORMAL across trend and volatility.

retail_market_state_agent.py.blurb: Detects open / close / holiday and writes the market_state composite score (sentiment 40 / news 25 / macro 35).

retail_bias_detection_agent.py.blurb: Behavioral-bias detector — sector concentration, loss aversion, disposition effect.

retail_validator_stack_agent.py.blurb: Final enrichment stamp — promotes signals QUEUED → VALIDATED when all upstream stamps are present.

retail_candidate_generator.py.blurb: Emits sector-driven candidate signals when momentum_score crosses the threshold.
